expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory (3 layers: Core, API, Frontend across 27+ files)
expectations.evidence: [!NOTE] Complexity advisory with Layer spread dimension: '3 distinct production layers touched (Core, API, Frontend)'

expectations.text: Flags new interface methods without default implementations as breaking changes (Pattern 3)
expectations.evidence: Critical: IUserService.UpdateCurrentUserAsync and IUserPresentationFactory.CreateUpdateCurrentUserModelAsync both flagged with Pattern 3 fix suggestions

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings functional: missing default impl, missing validation, error swallowing, missing CancellationToken

expectations.text: All findings reference code that was changed in the diff, not pre-existing issues
expectations.evidence: All findings reference new code added in this PR

expectations.text: Review assesses the new feature's architecture, patterns, or integration approach — not just absence of bugs
expectations.evidence: Assesses: layer spread architecture, missing validation parity with UpdateAsync, notification handler parity, modal error handling patterns
